_comment: Drop this file at the repo root as .score-drift-allowlist.json to suppress legitimate references. Document every entry with a sibling _why_ field.

_why_allowed_strings.sba_loans: Used as a data key for the Loans table (sba_loans, sba504_loans). Bank and lender repos legitimately reference this — it's the SBA loan record type, not the deactivated v1.0 pillar. See: lender/pages/api/lender.js, Bank/pages/index.jsx.

_why_allowed_paths.pages/api/index-overview.js: Bank app — returns Loans table rows including sba_loans field. Data layer, not scoring.
_why_allowed_paths.components/AdminPanel.jsx: Platform-Admin KB editor — uses entity_compliance, etc. as knowledge-domain slugs, not scoring pillar keys. Separate taxonomy.
